rows.title: Review the starter workflow
rows.summary: This seeded item proves the desktop shell, SQLite, and starter UI are already wired together.

rows.title: Replace this queue with your own job shape
rows.summary: Edit data/schema.json first. Then rename lanes, fields, and labels so the UI matches the workflow you actually ship.

rows.title: Add filesystem roots when the app needs real files
rows.summary: Declare scoped roots in rustframe.json and use window.RustFrame.fs.* helpers instead of assuming browser access.

rows.title: Use migrations before you ship schema changes
rows.summary: When version 2 needs backfills or renames, put the change in data/migrations/*.sql instead of editing old seed files.
